ANIMO LAUNCHER - TOOLTIP GIF FILES
===================================

MAIN TOOLBAR ICONS
------------------
transify.gif              - Anim Transfer
keys_time.gif             - Keys Time
fast_anim_layer.gif       - Fast Merge AnimLayers

pickify.gif               - Selection Sets
tweenify.gif              - Anim Sliders
tracify.gif               - Arc Tracker

spacify.gif               - Temp Controls
xform_align.gif           - Xform - Align
attributes_space_switcher.gif - Attributes Space Switcher

global_offset.gif         - Global Offset
twosify.gif               - Twosify
vectorify.gif             - Vectorify

tools_editor.gif          - Tools Editor
quick_exporter.gif        - Quick Exporter
multi_view_playblaster.gif - Multi-View Playblaster


LEFT SLIDER ICONS
-----------------
reset_pose.gif            - Reset Pose
fast_bake.gif             - Fast Bake
share_keys.gif            - Share Keys


TANGENT ICONS
-------------
auto_tangent.gif          - Auto Tangent
linear_tangent.gif        - Linear Tangent
step_tangent.gif          - Step Tangent


SELECT OPPOSITE
---------------
SelectOpposite.gif        - Select Opposite / Add Opposite


WHITE ICONS
-----------
SmoothSelectedKeys.gif    - Smooth Selected Keys
SmartSnapKeys.gif         - Smart Snap Keys
CropAnimation.gif         - Crop Animation
DeleteRedundantKeys.gif   - Delete Redundant Keys


SLIDERS
-------
tween.gif                 - Tween Machine (TW slider)
blend_to_neighbor.gif     - Blend to Neighbor (BN slider)
scale_left.gif            - Scale Keys (SL slider)
cascade.gif               - Cascade (CA slider)
